Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Witnesses To Attend Depositions, The Production Of Documents Specified In Pmk Deposition Notice, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-22-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on Plaintiffs John Aspelin and Barbara Kaplin-Aspelin's Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Witnesses To Attend Depositions, The Production Of Documents Specified In Pmk Deposition Notice, And For Monetary Sanctions as follows: The motion is unopposed and will be granted in its entirety, including sanctions for discovery abuse in the amount of $3500 against defendant City and County of San Francisco. Counsel to moving parties shall submit a proposed order consistent with the foregoing by email to jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James H. Fleming, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/HEK)
